title: podman container forward ports vs firewalld

comments.body:
Can you provide a reproducer?
`sudo podman run -p 127.0.0.1:8080:80 -d nginx` and `curl 127.0.0.1:8080` works for me

> Can you provide a reproducer? `sudo podman run -p 127.0.0.1:8080:80 -d nginx` and `curl 127.0.0.1:8080` works for me

Thank you. All work
